message:
Add .gitignore to exclude bv local config and caches

Add a .gitignore that excludes the .bv/ directory, which contains
beads_viewer (bv) local configuration and cache files. These are
machine-specific runtime artifacts that should not be tracked in
version control.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+# bv (beads viewer) local config and caches
+.bv/
